text.title: Eval-in-Prod Sampling Policy Decision Tree
text.summary: Two-question gate: preconditions present? duplicate artefact exists? Routes to run / update / skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ALL preconditions satisfied? (prerequisite artefacts present AND named owner identifiable AND artefact store writable)

branch.question: Does an existing working artefact already cover this gap?

branch.conclusion: Skip: do not duplicate. Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed). Methodology output goes to the existing record's notes field.
Run the procedure. Emit a new artefact per the output contract.
Skip this methodology. Surface the missing precondition. Defer until the gap is closed.

text.example: inputs: {owner=alex@acme.com, prerequisites_present=true, existing_artefact=false} q-preconditions -> true q-duplicate -> false => conclusion r2-typed-input: emit new artefact.
